summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ShopStack multi-tenant SaaS commerce platform. Fixed critical Next.js Server/Client Component serialization bug. All core flows working: landing page, login with all 4 demo roles, role-based redirects, public storefronts, and admin dashboards.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: DashboardSidebar was receiving Lucide icon components (functions) from Server Components, causing 'Functions cannot be passed directly to Client Components' error. Changed to pass icon names as strings and resolve them in the client component via iconMap.

success_rate.backend: N/A (no custom backend APIs - Supabase only)

seed_data_creation: Pre-existing Supabase seed data with 2 tenants (TechStore Pro, Fashion Boutique), 4 demo users, and sample products
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working. The app uses Supabase for auth and data - no custom backend APIs. Service role key mismatch noted in .env.local (different project ref) but doesn't affect core functionality. Focus future testing on: (1) actual product purchase flow, (2) staff invite functionality (may fail due to service role key), (3) theme customization, (4) new tenant onboarding.
tests_passed: Landing page loads with ShopStack branding, features, and demo account links
Login page renders with email/password form
Super Admin login redirects to /saas with Platform Overview dashboard
Store Admin login redirects to /store/techstore/admin with Store Dashboard
Manager login redirects to /store/techstore/manager with Manager Dashboard
Operative login redirects to /store/techstore/operative with Work Queue
Public storefront /techstore renders with products, hero, header, categories
Public storefront /fashionboutique renders with different theme/styling
Register page renders with full name, email, password fields
Super Admin can navigate to Tenants page showing 2 registered stores
Store Admin can navigate to Products page showing 3 products

bugs_fixed.issue: Unhandled Runtime Error: Functions cannot be passed directly to Client Components
bugs_fixed.root_cause: DashboardSidebar (Client Component) received navGroups with Lucide icon components from Server Component layouts
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed icon prop from LucideIcon type to string, added iconMap in DashboardSidebar to resolve icon names to components
